title: Guided Evolution for Neural Architecture Search

components.name: Search space
components.description: Specifies possible operations to be sampled and their connections, defining the type of architectures that can be generated

components.name: Search method
components.description: Represents the approach used to explore the search space and generate architectures

components.name: Performance estimation strategy
components.description: Defines how generated architectures are evaluated

challenges: High computational cost of most NAS approaches
Some methods fail to generalize to new datasets due to converging to local minima
mitigation_approaches: Cell-based design where small cells are replicated through an outer-skeleton
Performance estimation strategies including low-fidelity estimates, learning curve extrapolations, statistical approaches
One-shot methods where weights of generated models are inherited
results.reliable_approach: Fully training generated architectures and optimizing the search based on the most performant ones
